jalen johnson.detail: Played 39 minutes and scored 23 points; finished with only 3 assists despite full minutes
jalen johnson.web_narrative: Johnson played 39 full minutes and scored 23 points but recorded only 3 assists against the prop line of 4. No injury or foul trouble explains the miss; he simply did not generate enough playmaking opportunities in the Hawks' offense during the Game 1 loss.

jamal murray.detail: Played 39 minutes and scored 30 points but went 0-for-8 from three-point range
jamal murray.web_narrative: Murray played 39 minutes and scored 30 points but was 0-for-8 from three-point range, well short of the over 2 prop. He struggled with his shot from beyond the arc throughout the game despite an otherwise dominant scoring performance driven by a perfect 16-of-16 from the free-throw line.

julius randle.web_narrative: Randle played 31 minutes in a physical playoff game but managed only 2 assists against the over 4 prop. No injury or foul trouble is cited as a cause; the game's defensive intensity and a technical foul late limited his playmaking opportunities.
